## Severity

- [ ] **Clinical safety** — incorrect output that could affect patient care
- [ ] Functional bug — feature doesn't work as documented
- [ ] UI / UX — confusing layout, missing label, accessibility issue
- [ ] Performance — slow load, hang, etc.
- [ ] Documentation — README, docs/ inconsistent with behavior
